allow: Bash(python -c "import json;d=json.load\(open\('content/packs/movies.ko.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\);[print\(c['answer']['primary'],'→ 힌트',len\(c['hints']\),'개 / level1 pieces',c['hints'][0]['pieces'],'/ level2 pieces',c['hints'][1]['pieces']\) for c in d['cards']]")

Bash(python -c "import json;d=json.load\(open\('content/packs/movies.ko.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\);[print\(c['id'],'hints=',len\(c['hints']\),'levels=',[h['level'] for h in c['hints']],'kinds=',[h['kind'] for h in c['hints']]\) for c in d['cards']]")
